objective: Use the existing native OpenClaw UI as the primary commercial conversation experience. Keep Agent Harness and ORIS behind it as tool, policy, lifecycle and evidence layers, and keep Codex as the code executor. Retire the custom ORIS chat shell from the primary user path instead of rebuilding standard conversation features.

architecture_decision.agent_harness_role: backend policy, routing, structured tool contract and fallback; not the default end-user shell
architecture_decision.oris_role: task identity, lifecycle, queue, lease, cancellation, retry, evidence and audit
architecture_decision.codex_role: implementation, test, repair, commit and controlled push
architecture_decision.custom_oris_chat_shell_role: remove from root; retain temporarily only for diagnostics or rollback under a non-default route

diagnosis.prompt_problem: custom intent router and deterministic command parser altered normal conversational semantics and caused requests to depend on ORIS-specific rules
diagnosis.decision: native OpenClaw UI accepted as primary; custom ORIS shell retained only on restricted diagnostic/rollback routes

implemented: service, storage and features response contract
pytest coverage for status code and fields
completed_real_task.acceptance_gap: repaired: README API list now documents GET /capabilities
completed_real_task.final_acceptance: complete; implementation, tests, README, product commit/push, remote SHA and ORIS evidence verified

migration_requirements: discover the active native OpenClaw UI and session/history behavior without reinstalling or upgrading
discover effective Nginx route, WebSocket and authentication requirements before mutation
archive custom ORIS chat sessions outside Git
switch the effective Nginx root route from Web Console v5 to OpenClaw Gateway port 18789
expose ORIS actions through a stable tool/plugin contract rather than keyword parsing
retain a rollback route for the custom shell
verify native new-conversation, history, switching and clear/archive behavior
verify one natural-language development task without ORIS-specific syntax
repair the missing README update and verify product/evidence SHA
next_action: Discover and implement the stable OpenClaw tools/actions/plugin contract for ORIS, and establish response-latency observability before broader commercial rollout. Do not reopen the completed acceptance task without regression evidence.

completion.latency_observation: exact runtimeMs unavailable in current session CLI output; establish a dedicated response-latency baseline next
